race.comment: CAPRICORNUS (1) returns from a layoff of six-and-a-half months. Worth noting he filled a minor placing when returning from a spell last time in work over 1050m at Mackay. One of the genuine hopes in the race. CRAIGLEA MONNIE (11) was thereabouts last time out finishing fourth after being prominent at the turn at her latest appearance over 800m at Ipswich. Rates highly in this field and can turn things around. SHE'S GOT IT (6) led early and was still in the firing line on the turn last start before tiring to finish fourth over 1050m at Rockhampton. Suited in this line up and is among the better hopes. KENNY THE BAKER (2) was responsible for a better run last start, beaten 4.5 lengths into fourth over 800m at this track. Has his share of talent and is a top-three prospect.
